2396710.name: Fantasy Grounds - Rifts(R) for Savage Worlds Mega Power List
2396710.description:
Rifts(R) for Savage Worlds Mega Power List

This Fantasy Grounds Module is a complete list compiling all of the core Savage Worlds powers and their modifiers, along with their Mega Power modifiers from the Adventure Edition of Rifts(R): The Tomorrow Legion Player's Guide.
This product requires the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition core rules, Rifts(R): The Tomorrow Legion Player's Guide (Revised Edition), and Rifts(R): Game Master's Handbook (Revised Edition) to play. 
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joe Collins
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
